  "content": "import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma';\nimport { successResponse, errorResponse, notFoundResponse } from '@/lib/api-response';\n\n// GET /api/inquiries/[id] - 获取询盘详情\nexport async function GET(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    const inquiry = await prisma.inquiry.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: {\n        customer: {\n          select: {\n            id: true,\n            companyName: true,\n            contactName: true,\n            email: true,\n            phone: true,\n          },\n        },\n        followUps: {\n          orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!inquiry) {\n      return notFoundResponse('询盘');\n    }\n\n    return successResponse(inquiry);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error fetching inquiry:', error);\n    return errorResponse('Failed to fetch inquiry', 'INTERNAL_ERROR', 500);\n  }\n}\n\n// PUT /api/inquiries/[id] - 更新询盘\nexport async function PUT(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    const body = await request.json();\n\n    const inquiry = await prisma.inquiry.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: body,\n    });\n\n    return successResponse(inquiry, '询盘更新成功');\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating inquiry:', error);\n    return errorResponse('Failed to update inquiry', 'INTERNAL_ERROR', 500);\n  }\n}\n\n// DELETE /api/inquiries/[id] - 删除询盘\nexport async function DELETE(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    await prisma.inquiry.delete({\n      where: { id },\n    });\n\n    return successResponse(null, '询盘删除成功');\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting inquiry:', error);\n    return errorResponse('Failed to delete inquiry', 'INTERNAL_ERROR', 500);\n  }\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma';\n\n// GET /api/inquiries/[id] - 获取询盘详情\nexport async function GET(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    const inquiry = await prisma.inquiry.findUnique({\n      where: { id },\n      include: {\n        customer: {\n          select: {\n            id: true,\n            companyName: true,\n            contactName: true,\n            email: true,\n            phone: true,\n          },\n        },\n        followUps: {\n          orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n        },\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!inquiry) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: 'Inquiry not found' },\n        { status: 404 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json(inquiry);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error fetching inquiry:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: 'Failed to fetch inquiry' },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\n// PUT /api/inquiries/[id] - 更新询盘\nexport async function PUT(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    const body = await request.json();\n\n    const inquiry = await prisma.inquiry.update({\n      where: { id },\n      data: body,\n    });\n\n    return NextResponse.json(inquiry);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error updating inquiry:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: 'Failed to update inquiry' },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\n// DELETE /api/inquiries/[id] - 删除询盘\nexport async function DELETE(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  try {\n    const { id } = await params;\n    await prisma.inquiry.delete({\n      where: { id },\n    });\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error deleting inquiry:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: 'Failed to delete inquiry' },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n",
